author: Chrysalis
text:
README: refresh Task File Schema for all 24 task.json fields

The Field definitions table listed 18 fields; src/task.rs serializes 24 into the task JSON (the 25th, notes, is the .notes.jsonl sidecar). Add the six missing rows in struct order: synced_at, sync_status, repo, delivered_repo, target_branch, extra.

Update the example JSON block to add repo, and note which fields are omitted from the file when empty/unset so the example stays a valid literal file.
